title: sc-evaluator findings JSON shadow
description: Machine-readable shadow of the markdown findings file produced by scripts/sc-evaluator/run.sh. Every successful run writes both findings/<run_id>.md and findings/<run_id>.json; this schema describes the JSON document. See scripts/sc-evaluator/SCHEMA.md for the equivalent markdown layout.

run_id.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp identifying this run (with colons). Matches the frontmatter run_id and the body 'Started' line.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp the run started; identical to run_id today, kept as a separate field so tooling can distinguish identity from time.

commit_sha.description: Short git SHA of HEAD at run start (`git rev-parse --short HEAD`), or 'unknown' if not in a git checkout.

simulator.description: Human-readable simulator device name, e.g. 'iPhone 17 Pro'.

ios_version.description: iOS runtime version as reported by simctl, e.g. '26.4'.

steps.description: Chronological record of every step the runtime emitted, including setup steps (simulator.resolve, build, app.install) and journey steps.

detail.description: Free-form detail string; matches the text after the em-dash in the markdown bullet.

findings.description: Subset of `steps` that failed. One entry per FAIL step.

suggested_fixes.description: Anchors emitted via emit_fix_anchor. Each fix carries a `file:line` anchor when applicable. The `finding` field links a fix to the nearest preceding failing step (empty string when no finding was open at the time the fix was emitted).

finding.description: Name of the FAIL step this fix attaches to, or '' for fixes emitted outside any failure context.

anchor.description: File:line reference (e.g. 'apps/ios/SoloCompass/App/SoloCompassApp.swift:1') or a bare file path when no specific line applies.

screenshots.description: Screenshot artifacts captured during the run, in the order they were emitted.

label.description: Kebab-case label provided to the screenshot step (e.g. 'home-map').

path.description: Path to the PNG relative to the markdown findings file, e.g. '../screenshots/<run_id>/01-home-map.png'.

summary.description: Aggregate run result. Mirrors the '## Summary' section in the markdown file.

failure_reason.description: Short reason tag for FAIL results (e.g. '(setup)', '(build)', '(install)'). Null on PASS or when no specific category applies.
